Apply ALL of the following 3 fixes to this file:

Lines: 53, 98
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: plain

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 53):
   52          <div className="pf-v5-c-wizard__close">
   53            <Button aria-label={t('Close')} onClick={onClose} variant={ButtonVariant.plain}>
   54              <CloseIcon />

  (line 98):
   97            {!migrationCompleted && (
   98              <Button onClick={() => setRollbacking(true)} variant={ButtonVariant.secondary}>
   99                {t('Stop')}

```

### Fix 2
Lines: 53, 98
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: div

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 53):
   52          <div className="pf-v5-c-wizard__close">
   53            <Button aria-label={t('Close')} onClick={onClose} variant={ButtonVariant.plain}>
   54              <CloseIcon />

  (line 98):
   97            {!migrationCompleted && (
   98              <Button onClick={() => setRollbacking(true)} variant={ButtonVariant.secondary}>
   99                {t('Stop')}

```

### Fix 3
Lines: 67, 71, 82
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-descriptionlistterm]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <DescriptionListTerm> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</DescriptionListTerm>

Incident context:
  componentName: DescriptionListTerm
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: DescriptionListGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: DescriptionListTerm
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```

   68          </DescriptionListGroup>

  (line 71):

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/views/virtualmachines/actions/components/VirtualMachineMigration/VirtualMachineMigrationStatus.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: `Button.variant` type change
The type change just **adds** `'stateful'` to the union. The existing values `ButtonVariant.plain` (line 53) and `ButtonVariant.secondary` (line 98) are still valid. **No code change needed** — these values remain in the new type.

### Fix 2: Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>`
- **Line 53**: `<Button aria-label={t('Close')} onClick={onClose} variant={ButtonVariant.plain}><CloseIcon /></Button>` — This Button contains **only** an icon (`<CloseIcon />`). Move it to the `icon` prop and make self-closing.
- **Line 98**: `<Button onClick={() => setRollbacking(true)} variant={ButtonVariant.secondary}>{t('Stop')}</Button>` — This Button contains only text, **no icon**. No change needed.

### Fix 3: Icon children to `icon` prop on `<DescriptionListTerm>`
- **Lines 67, 71, 82**: All three `<DescriptionListTerm>` instances contain only text (`{getMigrationStatusLabel(vmim)}`, `{t('Started on')}`, `{t('Status')}`). **No icons present** — no change needed.

So the only actual code change is on lines 53-55: moving `<CloseIcon />` from children to the `icon` prop.

After this change, `CloseIcon` is still imported (line 19) and still used (in the `icon` prop), so the import stays.
Let me verify the final file looks correct:

The file looks correct. All imports are still used and the structure is clean.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (adding `'stateful'`)
**No change needed.** The type change only *adds* `'stateful'` to the union. The existing values `ButtonVariant.plain` (line 53) and `ButtonVariant.secondary` (line 98) remain valid in the new type and require no modification.

### Fix 2 — Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>`
**Applied (line 53 only).** The `<Button>` at line 53 contained only `<CloseIcon />` as children. Moved the icon to the `icon` prop and made the element self-closing:
- Before: `<Button aria-label={t('Close')} onClick={onClose} variant={ButtonVariant.plain}><CloseIcon /></Button>`
- After: `<Button aria-label={t('Close')} onClick={onClose} variant={ButtonVariant.plain} icon={<CloseIcon />} />`

**No change needed at line 98.** The `<Button>` at line 98 contains only text (`{t('Stop')}`), no icon — the rule does not apply there.

### Fix 3 — Icon children to `icon` prop on `<DescriptionListTerm>`
**No change needed.** All three `<DescriptionListTerm>` instances (lines 65, 69, 80) contain only text children (`{getMigrationStatusLabel(vmim)}`, `{t('Started on')}`, `{t('Status')}`). None contain icon elements, so the rule does not apply.

chunks.response:
The file looks correct. All imports are still used and the structure is clean.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (adding `'stateful'`)
**No change needed.** The type change only *adds* `'stateful'` to the union. The existing values `ButtonVariant.plain` (line 53) and `ButtonVariant.secondary` (line 98) remain valid in the new type and require no modification.

### Fix 2 — Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>`
**Applied (line 53 only).** The `<Button>` at line 53 contained only `<CloseIcon />` as children. Moved the icon to the `icon` prop and made the element self-closing:
- Before: `<Button aria-label={t('Close')} onClick={onClose} variant={ButtonVariant.plain}><CloseIcon /></Button>`
- After: `<Button aria-label={t('Close')} onClick={onClose} variant={ButtonVariant.plain} icon={<CloseIcon />} />`

**No change needed at line 98.** The `<Button>` at line 98 contains only text (`{t('Stop')}`), no icon — the rule does not apply there.

### Fix 3 — Icon children to `icon` prop on `<DescriptionListTerm>`
**No change needed.** All three `<DescriptionListTerm>` instances (lines 65, 69, 80) contain only text children (`{getMigrationStatusLabel(vmim)}`, `{t('Started on')}`, `{t('Status')}`). None contain icon elements, so the rule does not apply.
